agents.name: Interviewer
agents.role: Extracts structured requirements; accepts Arabic or English input

agents.name: Architect
agents.role: Synthesizes requirements and debate into a copilot config

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Instantiates the copilot from the config

agents.name: Validator
agents.role: Runs sample inputs through the new copilot and rejects if substandard

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.role: Reviews documents against the org-tuned stance

agents.name: Citation Verifier
agents.role: Validates every regulatory citation against the corpus via exact-text retrieval

agents.name: Counter-Proposal Drafter
agents.role: Drafts replacement clauses for flagged risks

agents.name: Synthesis
agents.role: Assembles final output with confidence scores and audit trail

system_prompts.reviewer: You review NDAs against the org's tuned PDPL/Labour stance. Flag clauses with confidence scores; cite exact articles.
system_prompts.citation_verifier: Verify every cited article against the corpus via exact-text retrieval; reject hallucinated citations.

interpretation_overrides.stance: Require explicit consent re-confirmation for cross-border transfers to banking partners.

validation_results.feedback: Sample NDA produced 3 well-cited findings; thresholds applied correctly.

arguments: PDPL Article 7 consent must be explicit and re-confirmed for any cross-border transfer to banking partners.
Confidentiality obligations should survive termination indefinitely for personal data categories.
Indemnity caps below full liability expose the org under PDPL breach notification duties.
Indefinite confidentiality is rarely accepted by vendors; a 5-year tail post-termination is market-standard and enforceable.
Blanket re-consent on every transfer creates operational friction; a documented standing consent with audit log meets PDPL intent.
Mutual indemnity caps at 12 months fees are commercially reasonable.

audit_trail.reason: Need at least two rounds to resolve the cross-border consent split.

audit_trail.reason: Tighten reviewer prompt to mandate citations; wire escalation list.

issues: Reviewer prompt does not enforce citation on every regulatory claim.
Risk threshold for data_transfer_abroad not wired to auto-escalation.

audit_trail.reason: Sample NDA produced 3 well-cited findings; thresholds applied correctly.
